title: Trump Tries to Stop Drug Smuggling From South America. Drug Smugglers Invent New Tactics.
summary_full: Authorities are using drones, troops and A.I. to crack down on cocaine smuggling. But gangs are finding new ways to move record amounts of drugs across the world.
summary_public: Authorities are using drones, troops and A.I. to crack down on cocaine smuggling. But gangs are finding new ways to move record amounts of drugs across the world.
